meaning: adj.[数][物][晶]参(变) 数的,参(变)量的
examples: I have a parametric equation for my surface.
That is a parametric equation for the sphere.
I am not going to write parametric equations.
The number three player, PTC (formerly Parametric Technology), has faltered badly in recent years.
That could keep it in front of such rivals as Parametric Technology and Oracle.
